title: Author product-detail views for the Navigation aisle
description: Author one stateless product-detail view per Navigation-aisle widget. Each view is a TViewBuilder<XxxProductViewModel> that renders the widget being demonstrated with a live preview panel, a debug-controls form bound to the view model's cells, a metadata row, an advanced collapsible section, and a usage-snippet markdown block.

context.shared_page_structure: Every product detail page has the same bones: TDetailHeader (widget name + tagline) → row of TKeyValueField metadata (aisle, source path, stateful/stateless, direct deps) → live preview panel that renders the widget using current view model cells → TFormSection 'Debug controls' with one shadcn_ui field per tunable cell → TCollapsibleSection 'Advanced' for rarely-used props → TMarkdownFileItem 'Usage snippet' showing the Dart code that produces the current preview.
context.aisle_scope: Seven product detail views: TContextualAppBar, TContextualBottomNavigation, TContextualSideNavigation, TContextualNavButton, TSideNavBar, TContextualButtons, ContextualButtonsProvider.
context.structural_widgets_previews: TContextualButtons and ContextualButtonsProvider do not render visible chrome by themselves. Their 'live preview' is a bounded demo region that wires a tiny internal example using them, so visitors can see the overlay happening.

goals: Seven product detail view files under example/lib/showcase/feature/navigation/views/{widget_snake_case}_showcase/{widget_snake_case}_showcase_view.dart.
Each view is a StatelessWidget wrapping TViewBuilder<XxxProductViewModel>.
Each view follows the shared page structure exactly — do not invent per-widget layout variation unless the widget genuinely requires it.
Debug controls are rendered through TFormSection with shadcn_ui inputs (ShadInput, ShadSelect, ShadSlider, ShadCheckbox) bound via ValueListenableBuilder to the view model's TNotifier cells.
Usage snippet markdown reflects the current cell values — update it live or render a static canonical snippet if live updates add noise.
non_goals: Routing or theme toggling (the shell owns those).
Owning any state — every knob is a cell on the view model.
acceptance_criteria: Opening each navigation product detail renders its header, metadata row, live preview, debug controls, advanced collapsible, and usage snippet.
Mutating a debug control updates the live preview within the same frame (verified visually via hot reload + manual interaction).
Callback-typed knobs produce a toast (via shadcn_ui snackbar / toaster or equivalent) when the callback fires.
No Material chrome is used — only turbo_widgets and shadcn_ui.
constraints: Stateless views. Every cell-driven rebuild happens inside a ValueListenableBuilder / ValueListenableBuilderX2..X6 / MultiListenableBuilder.
Extract a shared product-detail page skeleton helper if all seven views repeat identical scaffolding — do not paste the skeleton seven times.
tools_to_use: RepoPrompt MCP (read_file, get_code_structure) for each widget source and its corresponding view model.
dart-mcp for launch + hot reload iteration.

verification_gate: Manual verification: open each of the seven product detail pages, move at least one debug control on each, confirm the preview updates, confirm the callback toast fires where applicable.

quality_checklist.maintainability: Shared page skeleton extracted — adding a new navigation widget means authoring a new view model + a thin new view that supplies cells into the shared skeleton.
quality_checklist.dry: No copy-pasted scaffolding across the seven views.
quality_checklist.single_responsibility: One view renders one widget's showcase.
quality_checklist.performance: Value listeners are scoped tight enough that sliding one slider does not rebuild unrelated sections of the page.

workflow_instructions: Start by extracting the shared page skeleton, then use it for all seven views.
Add `follow_up_notes` to 15, 16, 17, 18 pointing at the shared skeleton helper so those tasks reuse it instead of re-extracting.
follow_up_notes: Phase 3 task 06 created 7 product-detail view models for the Navigation aisle. Summary:
1. TContextualAppBarShowcaseViewModel — cells: title (String), showLabels (bool), lastCallbackFired (String?). Mutators: updateTitle, toggleShowLabels, onButtonPressed(String).

2. TContextualBottomNavigationShowcaseViewModel — cells: selectedKey (String?), showLabels (bool), lastSelectedKey (String?). Provides sampleButtons Map. Mutators: updateSelectedKey, toggleShowLabels, onSelect(String).

3. TContextualSideNavigationShowcaseViewModel — cells: selectedKey (String?), showLabels (bool), spacing (double), lastSelectedKey (String?). Provides sampleButtons Map. Mutators: updateSelectedKey, toggleShowLabels, updateSpacing, onSelect(String).
4. TContextualNavButtonShowcaseViewModel — cells: showLabel (bool), lastPressed (String?). Mutators: toggleShowLabel, onPressed.

5. TSideNavBarShowcaseViewModel — cells: layout (TSideNavBarLayout), isExpanded (bool), selectedKey (String?), showDividers (bool), buttonAlignment (TSideNavBarButtonAlignment), lastSelectedKey (String?). Provides sampleButtons Map. Mutators: updateLayout, toggleIsExpanded, updateSelectedKey, toggleShowDividers, updateButtonAlignment, onSelect(String).

6. TContextualButtonsShowcaseViewModel — cells: showTop (bool), showBottom (bool), showLeft (bool), showRight (bool), allowFilter (TContextualAllowFilter), lastConfigChange (String?). Derived: hiddenPositions (Set<TContextualPosition>). Mutators: toggleShowTop/Bottom/Left/Right, updateAllowFilter.
None registered in GetIt — construct inline in TViewBuilder.
